case_title: ANTHONY CHAN VS. GEE HOW OAKTIN BENEVOLENT ASSOCIATION OF AMERICA

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT GEE HOW OAKTIN BENEVOLENT ASSOCIATION OF AMERICA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-04-2016 - JUDGMENT.
COPYING FEES (1 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF CHAN, ANTHONY
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY CHAN, ANTHONY AS TO DEFENDANT GEE HOW OAKTIN BENEVOLENT ASSOCIATION OF AMERICA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-04-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHAN, ANTHONY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GEE HOW OAKTIN BENEVOLENT ASSOCIATION OF AMERICA THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED AT THE HEARING FAILS TO SUPPORT A FINDING OF BAD FAITH, FAILS TO SUPPORT THAT PLAINTIFF WAS DEFAMED AND FAILS TO SUPPORT PLAINTFF'S CLAIM FOR DAMAGES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $5.00- SERVED JUN-29-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GEE HOW OAKTIN BENEVOLENT ASSOCIATION OF AMERICA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-04-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-04-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF ANTHONY CHAN AND DEFENDANT'S REPRESENTATIVE EDWIN CHAN, PRESIDENT OF THE GEE HOW OAKTIN BENEVOLENT ASSOCIATION OF AMERICA. INVALID PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE, BUT EDWIN CHAN WAIVED SERVICE OF PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AT TODAY'S HEARING. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
